short_description: Embark on a journey of Zen koans in a Buddhist mandala space Reach Nirvana with a 1 in 8192 chance in a mystical world adorned with tombstones and Buddha statues.
detailed_description:
h2]Playtime[/h2]
1 min to infinity: It's all up to your luck

Embark on a journey of Zen koans in a Buddhist mandala space
Reach Nirvana with a 1 in 8192 chance in a mystical world adorned with tombstones and Buddha statues.

Basic Gameplay

Each stage has a blue and a green gate.
The gates are randomly set as "win" or "lose" each time.
Players progress based on the gate they choose.
Winning gate: Proceed to the next stage
Losing gate: Return to the first stage

Controls

Move: WASD
Run: Shift + WASD
Look around: Mouse
Make an offering: E
Clap: Q
Settings: Esc

Streaming and Video Guidelines

You can stream without permission.
Please include the game name in your video or stream title and this store page URL in the description.
We are not responsible for any damages resulting from playing or streaming this game.
These guidelines are subject to change without notice.
